name: Incident Timeline Builder
shortDescription: Builds ordered incident timelines from multi-source evidence.
longDescription: Normalizes and orders incident events from logs/alerts/changes into timeline artifacts for debugging and post-incident review.
author: ARS SRE

inputs.name: incident_events
inputs.description: Timestamped event records from relevant systems.

includedAssets.name: scripts/build_timeline.py
includedAssets.description: Parses and sorts timestamped events into deterministic timeline order.

includedAssets.name: references/event-schema.md
includedAssets.description: Schema for timeline event input records.

includedAssets.name: references/timeline-quality-checks.md
includedAssets.description: Quality checks for complete, reviewable incident timelines.

failureModes: Timezone parsing errors can reorder events.
Incomplete event feeds reduce timeline trustworthiness.

examples.title: Checkout incident timeline
examples.summary: Converts mixed alert and log records into ordered chronology.

changelog.summary: Initial release for incident timeline generation.
